titles.text: Bakusou Dekotora Densetsu: Otoko Ippiki Yume Kaidoi

descriptions.text: Bakusou Dekotora Densetsu: Otoko Ippiki Yume Kaidoi is a racing video game developed and released by Human Entertainment, released on June 25, 1998 in Japan. This game puts you in the role of a truck driver in Japan, transporting cargo and competing in illegal races against other trucks.
